ground_truth.title: Most profitable electrical skill??
ground_truth.author: khixxx
ground_truth.main_content: This forum discussion explores the most profitable electrical skills in the industry. The original poster asks about skills like Solar, Lightning protection, I&C, Communications, Automation, and Residential construction. Multiple electrical professionals share their perspectives. The consensus among most responders is that troubleshooting skills are the most valuable and profitable, with Jeff Weissman Electric sharing a detailed example of finding a tripped breaker in a hidden Zinsco panel for a millionaire client. bphgravity argues that Design and Consultation is #1, followed by Project Bidding and Private Third-Party Inspection. mdshunk notes that electricians are 'a dime a dozen' but good troubleshooters are rare and worth 'a King's ransom.' solaeros mentions that while troubleshooting skills are valuable, wages for such work often cap at $18-20/hour. Additional topics include the challenges of directing workers, the value of factory maintenance experience, and the importance of identifying root causes in any profession.
with: This forum discussion explores the most profitable electrical skills in the industry.
